description_long: This is a modern BMX-style bicycle with a compact, angular frame finished in a deep burgundy color. It features two large, black spoked wheels with thick tires, designed for durability and urban riding. The handlebars are flat and slightly raised, providing good control and maneuverability, while the pedals are wide and textured for grip. The seat is a standard black saddle, positioned for an upright riding posture. The frame geometry is a classic diamond shape, with a visible rear suspension spring for shock absorption. There are no baskets or racks attached, emphasizing a minimalist, performance-oriented design.
description: A burgundy BMX-style bicycle with a diamond frame, flat handlebars, and thick black wheels, designed for urban use. It features a standard saddle and no additional racks or baskets.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full diamond frame, both wheels, and the rear suspension spring clearly.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the flat handlebars, front wheel, and the narrow profile of the frame.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the frame geometry, both wheels, and the pedal arrangement.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the seat, rear wheel, and the alignment of the pedals and frame.
